name: The Holodeck
description:
Sooo...

Many people complained that I only criticize their bots but never make a public one myself. So here it is. I hope you like it and enjoy the concept.

Images were made with Google Gemini Nanobanana Pro.

I did not add any example dialogues yet. If you have good ideas for examples, please tell me.

I'm open to any feedback on how we could improve the Holodeck and make it even better!

First message difference:

1 = "Hello Player 1"

2 = "Hello {{user}}"

3 = Empty Holodeck.

My suggestion:

Create a persona named "Player 1" and simply write:

"I am a human player. I will jump into the role of my character, which I will define in the chat memory, also known as 'summary'. Never play as my character!"

I recommend this because it might confuse the AI if you provide a full body description while playing someone else.

This setting is for those moments when you watched a movie, read a book, or experienced something in real life and thought, "Man, I wish I could jump into that scene and play it differently." Or, "I wish I had behaved differently in that moment."

It is meant for situations where you don’t want to create an entirely new roleplay setting, but just want to enjoy a specific scene or short moment. I would not recommend using this for a long, universe-focused roleplay. It is more of a "jump in, have fun, and leave" experience.

I also recommend use ChatGPT or Sonnet 4.5 from Claude/Anthropic to upload an image of your desired characters to let it create easily a character appearance, which you can then insert into the chat memory.

(Proofread by ChatGPT)

Update: Fugg... 777 🎰 permanent tokens?! Nice... I can never edit it anymore 🥹

Update 2: I added to the scenario to append the name of the acting character at the beginning of each acting line. Like

{{Char}}:

King: "You fool!"

Angry crowd: "Punish him!"

I also added example dialogues, all changes was made without destroying the beautiful 777 permanent tokens 😃

Okay, just tested it: example dialogues will not change the permanent tokens, so I can still add some.

First I made the avatar:

Then I asked it to zoom a bit out and reduce the muscles, but I think it's still very muscular 🫣

And then I created the Holodeck and told it to insert the avatar in it + the scene from the first message. I had to create one more image to spread the arms.

But I must say, it's pretty cool!
creator: BeLuna
